challenges.title: Multiple Selector Types
challenges.description: Create an HTML page demonstrating four CSS selector types: element selector (p), class selector (.intro), ID selector (#banner), and descendant selector (div p). Include matching HTML elements for each selector. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Demonstrate element, class, ID, and descendant selectors -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '')[0] assert '.intro' in style_block, 'Should define a .intro class selector' assert '#banner' in style_block, 'Should define a #banner ID selector' assert 'div p' in style_block or 'div p' in style_block, 'Should define a descendant selector (div p)' assert 'class="intro"' in html.lower() or "class='intro'" in html.lower(), 'Should apply the intro class to an element' assert 'id="banner"' in html.lower() or "id='banner'" in html.lower(), 'Should apply the banner ID to an element' assert '
' in html.lower() or '
element' assert '

' in html.lower() or '
